CheckTitle: AI Agent Model and Library Licenses Must Be Documented and Compliant
CheckType: Software and Configuration Checks/AI Agent Security Best Practices
Description: **AI Agent Supply Chain Security**. Validates that all model weights and third-party libraries used by AI agents have documented, reviewed, and organisationally compliant licenses. Copyleft licenses (GPL, AGPL) in commercial products and unlicensed components create significant legal exposure.
Risk: Using components with incompatible or undocumented licenses can result in forced open-sourcing of proprietary code, legal injunctions, and significant financial penalties. AI model licenses often have usage restrictions that commercial deployments may violate.

Code.Other:
1. Run license scanning (FOSSA, LicenseChecker, pip-licenses) on every dependency and model.
2. Maintain a Software Bill of Materials (SBOM) with license data for all components.
3. Define an approved license policy and fail CI/CD on non-compliant licenses.
4. Consult legal counsel before using GPL/AGPL-licensed components in commercial products.

Recommendation.Text: Integrate license scanning into the CI/CD pipeline and maintain an SBOM. Define and enforce an approved license policy that excludes incompatible copyleft licenses for commercial use.

Notes: ASPM-074 check from the Prowler ASPM check suite.
